title: Ubiquiti UniFi 5G Max Outdoor
description: UniFi 5G Max Outdoor is a high-performance 5G solution specifically engineered for outdoor environments. It is designed to enhance any UniFi Cloud Gateway or UniFi Gateway with reliable cellular connectivity. It supports dual SIM, with a secondary physical or eSIM, enabling seamless failover for critical applications. There is (1) 2.5G Ethernet port for LAN connectivity and 802.3at PoE power input (maximum power consumption is 14.5 W) It has enhanced weatherproofing, featuring a rugged, weather-resistant enclosure rated at IPX6 for protection against harsh conditions. For greater protection against the elements, upgrade to an IP67 rating using the included cable-gland door kit. In addition, the UniFi 5G Max Outdoor features a built-in high-gain directional antenna. It delivers stronger, more consistent performance in outdoor environments by improving signal reception and extending coverage Outdoor modem with antenna Cable-gland door IP67 kit (2) Mounting metal strap Antenna bracket Screws and wall plugs kit Tools Drilling template
